testcase.name: Carga exitosa de archivo de entrada de casos de prueba (.in)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:40363}, goog:processID: 133124, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:40363/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 778cc586130bd7bb44e572dd83d2bade

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:40363}, goog:processID: 133124, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:40363/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 778cc586130bd7bb44e572dd83d2bade at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.utils.AdminContestCleaner.loginAsAdmin(AdminContestCleaner.java:64) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.utils.AdminContestCleaner.finishRunningContestsAsAdmin(AdminContestCleaner.java:45) at bo.juezvirtual.automation.steps.Hooks.finishRunningContestsBeforeCleanContestScenarios(Hooks.java:28)
testcase.system-out: Given el administrador navega a la pagina de login del panel................skipped When el administrador introduce el usuario "administrador_qa" y clave "administrador_qa".skipped Then el administrador deberia ver el dashboard administrativo...............skipped Given el docente esta en la pagina de creacion de problemas.................skipped When crea un problema con titulo "Suma de dos números", tiempo "2", memoria "128", autor "Patito QA" y descripciones basicas.skipped Then el problema deberia ser guardado con exito.............................skipped And el problema "Suma de dos números" deberia aparecer listado..............skipped Given el docente esta en el administrador de archivos del problema "Suma de dos números".skipped When sube el archivo de casos de prueba "src/test/resources/testcases/sum_1.in".skipped Then el archivo "sum_1.in" deberia aparecer listado en la pagina............skipped

testcase.name: Carga exitosa de archivo de salida de casos de prueba (.out)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for condition to not be valid: url to contain "/login". Current url: "http://localhost:8083/admin/login" (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.12.94+deb13-amd64', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.46, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.46 (5b586c06e0d2..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:35733}, goog:processID: 133499, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:35733/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.46, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 59dc8d48f5c4f4dd1c35fe974d4fd400
